name: git-batch-tools
title: Git Batch Tools
description: Batch git operations (pull, status) across multiple project groups
author: Logan-8f

commands.name: batch-pull
commands.title: Batch Pull
commands.subtitle: Git Batch Tools
commands.description: Scan and pull all git repositories in configured directories

commands.name: batch-status
commands.title: Batch Status
commands.subtitle: Git Batch Tools
commands.description: View git status of all repositories in a project group

preferences.name: editorApp
preferences.title: Editor
preferences.description: The editor app to use when opening a project

preferences.name: editorAppAlt
preferences.title: Alternate Editor
preferences.description: The alternate editor app to use when opening a project

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Terminal App
preferences.description: The terminal app to use when opening a project

preferences.name: maxParallelProcesses
preferences.title: Max Parallel Processes
preferences.description: Maximum number of parallel git pull processes

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
